description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a predominantly white exterior. The front facade includes a set of double glass doors beneath a flat overhang, flanked by a vertical array of black horizontal slats that add visual interest and privacy. Large, rectangular windows are present on one side, allowing ample natural light into the interior, while the opposite side has smaller, more discrete window openings. The rear of the house is characterized by a row of evenly spaced square windows, maintaining the geometric aesthetic. The roof is flat and extends slightly beyond the walls, creating a subtle shadow line around the perimeter. The overall structure sits on a broad, flat base, suggesting a single-story layout with a focus on horizontal space.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, and a mix of large and small rectangular windows. The front features double glass doors and a striking black slatted accent.
description_view_0: Front view showing double glass doors, a black slatted accent wall, and a flat overhang above the entry.
description_view_1: Side view with a long, uninterrupted white wall, small horizontal windows, and the black slatted accent visible at the far end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a row of four evenly spaced square windows and a clean, minimalist wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two large blue-tinted windows and a flat roof overhang, emphasizing openness and light.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of large and small rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double glass doors beneath a flat overhang, accented by vertical black slats; no visible steps or porch.
